metadata.description: Component Description Format (CDF) skills for Claude Code — scaffold and snapshot CDF Profiles from a design system.

plugins.name: cdf
plugins.description: Two complementary CDF Profile skills: cdf-profile-scaffold (production-grade 7-phase) + cdf-profile-snapshot (5–10 min first-touch). Bundles @formtrieb/cdf-mcp via .mcp.json.
